# Implement Feature Prompt

## What this file is

This is a reusable prompt for implementing a feature with AI coding tools.

## How to use

Paste the prompt below when you want the AI to implement a specific feature.

---

Use the workflow in `ai/workflows/feature-delivery.md`.

Read:
- ai/project/project.md
- ai/project/current-stage.md
- ai/project/decisions.md
- ai/project/backlog.md
- ai/project/product-requirements.md
- ai/project/architecture.md
- ai/project/implementation-plan.md

Then inspect only the files relevant to the requested feature.

Your goals:
1. Understand the feature.
2. Identify affected products and packages.
3. Create a short implementation plan.
4. Implement incrementally.
5. Preserve architecture consistency.
6. Update documentation if necessary.
7. Suggest tests.
